description_long: This is a modern, single-story house with a flat roof and a minimalist rectangular design. The front features a wide entryway flanked by tall windows and a paved walkway lined with small trees. The rear of the house opens onto a spacious patio with a swimming pool, outdoor seating area, and a row of trees providing privacy. The side views reveal additional landscaping, including a garden bed with evenly spaced plants and a green lawn. Large windows and glass doors are prominent, allowing for ample natural light and a seamless indoor-outdoor connection. The overall aesthetic is clean, geometric, and contemporary, with a focus on open spaces and functional outdoor living.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, large windows, and a spacious backyard featuring a pool and landscaped gardens. The design is minimalist and geometric, emphasizing open spaces and outdoor living.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, tall windows, paved walkway, and small trees lining the approach.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the garden bed with evenly spaced plants and the pool area extending to the rear.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the large patio, swimming pool, outdoor seating, and a row of privacy trees.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the green lawn, garden bed, and the side wall of the house.
attribute_entryway_design: Wide, central entryway with tall glass doors, flanked by vertical windows and a paved walkway lined with small trees.
